entry.title: From Snowflake to Apache Doris: real-time analytics with 80% cost savings
entry.summary: Parth Soni, a Senior Data Engineer at Planet, completed a real-world migration from Snowflake to Apache Doris. Following the migration, his team reduced their monthly costs from $25K to $5K, while gaining truly real-time data ingestion, 5x faster query performance across various scenarios, and up to 90x speed improvements for large-table analytics.
entry.content:
Blog/Best Practice

From Snowflake to Apache Doris: real-time analytics with 80% cost savings

velodb.io · VeloDB Engineering TeamJuly 30, 2025

entry.title: Leading AI Company Revamped Observability: 10x Faster Queries & 83% Cost Savings with Apache Doris
entry.summary: A leading AI and Speech Technology company upgraded its observability platform by replacing Elasticsearch and Loki with Apache Doris. This transition addressed critical issues of high storage costs with Elasticsearch and slow query performance with Loki.
entry.content:
Blog/Best Practice

Leading AI Company Revamped Observability: 10x Faster Queries & 83% Cost Savings with Apache Doris

velodb.io · VeloDB Engineering TeamJuly 28, 2025

entry.title: How SF Technology Replaced Presto with Apache Doris to Achieve 3x Faster Queries and 48% Cost Savings
entry.summary: SF Technology migrated its primary BI analytics platform from Presto to Apache Doris, supporting over 1 million daily queries. This strategic move solved critical issues with query speed, stability, and high costs.
entry.content:
Blog/Best Practice

How SF Technology Replaced Presto with Apache Doris to Achieve 3x Faster Queries and 48% Cost Savings

velodb.io · VeloDB Engineering TeamJuly 27, 2025

entry.title: Why Apache Doris excels at OLAP: a deep dive into real-time update technology
entry.summary: Apache Doris is all about making real-time analytics faster, smoother, and more adaptable for modern data needs. For primary key tables, Apache Doris delivers seamless UPSERT semantics, leveraging primary key indexes and a mark-for-deletion mechanism to ensure top-notch write performance and low-latency queries. Plus, its user-defined conflict resolution boosts concurrency for real-time writes, while fast Schema Change functionality keeps data flows uninterrupted. Flexible column updates and options further empower a wide range of real-time use cases with ease.
entry.content:
Blog/Tech Sharing

Why Apache Doris excels at OLAP: a deep dive into real-time update technology

velodb.io · VeloDB Engineering TeamJuly 25, 2025

entry.title: Kwai Replaced ClickHouse with Apache Doris for a Smart, Unified Lakehouse Architecture
entry.summary: Kwai, a leading social media platform, has replaced ClickHouse with Apache Doris to upgrade its OLAP system, now handling nearly 1 billion daily queries. This move shifts them from a complex lake-warehouse separation model to a unified lakehouse architecture. The new system leverages Doris's direct lake access and an intelligent auto-materialization service to solve critical issues of data redundancy, resource contention, and complex governance.
entry.content:
Blog/Best Practice

Kwai Replaced ClickHouse with Apache Doris for a Smart, Unified Lakehouse Architecture

velodb.io · VeloDB Engineering TeamJuly 19, 2025

entry.title: From ClickHouse to Apache Doris: Powering Trillion-Log-Scale Analytics at a Leading Music Streaming Service
entry.summary: A major music streaming platform successfully migrated its massive 2PB log analytics from ClickHouse to Apache Doris, achieving up to 7x faster searches, 30% lower P99 query latency, 2.5x higher concurrency, and significant operational savings.
entry.content:
Blog/Tech Sharing

From ClickHouse to Apache Doris: Powering Trillion-Log-Scale Analytics at a Leading Music Streaming Service

velodb.io · VeloDB Engineering TeamJuly 17, 2025

entry.title: Building Real-Time Lakehouse with Apache Doris: A Practical Guide
entry.summary: The Lakehouse is a data management paradigm that combines the advantages of data lakes and data warehouses. Apache Doris advances this concept with its core philosophies of Boundless Data, Seamless Lakehouse. This article takes a deeper dive into its typical application scenarios to help readers better understand and apply its capabilities.
entry.content:
Blog/Tech Sharing

Building Real-Time Lakehouse with Apache Doris: A Practical Guide

velodb.io · VeloDB Engineering TeamJuly 15, 2025

entry.title: From Elasticsearch to Apache Doris: How a Leading Payment Platform Upgraded its Financial Security Analytics, Boosting Queries by 56x
entry.summary: A leading payment platform, handling over 600 million daily security events, replaced its Elasticsearch and Hudi stack with Apache Doris. This move achieved up to 56x faster queries, 50% lower storage costs, and 58% higher write throughput, while simplifying architecture and boosting developer efficiency.
entry.content:
Blog/Tech Sharing

From Elasticsearch to Apache Doris: How a Leading Payment Platform Upgraded its Financial Security Analytics, Boosting Queries by 56x

velodb.io · VeloDB Engineering TeamJuly 13, 2025

entry.title: 1 Billion JSON Records, 1-Second Query Response
entry.summary: Who reigns over JSONBench? Apache Doris ranks among the top-performers, second only to two versions of Clickhouse (the maintainer of JSONBench itself). After some simple tuning, Apache Doris outperforms ClickHouse by 39%.
entry.content:
Blog/Tech Sharing

1 Billion JSON Records, 1-Second Query Response

velodb.io · Xiaolei, Apache Doris CommitterJuly 2, 2025

entry.title: EMQX now supports real-time data ingestion into Apache Doris for efficient IoT analytics
entry.summary: Apache Doris data integration is an out-of-the-box feature in EMQX, which enables complex business development through simple configuration. In a typical IoT application, EMQX, as the IoT platform, is responsible for device connection and transmitting messages. Apache Doris, as the data storage platform, is responsible for storing device status and metadata, as well as message data storage and data analysis. Using EMQX and Apache Doris, users can build high-performance, reliable, and scalable IoT applications that deliver an end-to-end solution from data acquisition through analytics to actionable intelligence.
entry.content:
Blog/Tech Sharing

EMQX now supports real-time data ingestion into Apache Doris for efficient IoT analytics

velodb.io · VeloDB Engineering TeamJuly 2, 2025

entry.title: The data lakehouse evolution: why Apache Doris is leading the way
entry.summary: As enterprises push forward with building a lakehouse architecture, they often face complex challenges. Apache Doris aims to facilitate this process. It offers easy data access (from Hive, Iceberg, Hudi, Paimon), an extensible connector framework (with Kudu, BigQuery, Delta Lake, Kafka, and Redis) and convenient cross-source data processing with high analytics performance. It also allows easy deployment, a rich set of data storage and management capabilities, and strong support for open table formats and file formats.
entry.content:
Blog/Tech Sharing

The data lakehouse evolution: why Apache Doris is leading the way

velodb.io · Rayner Chen, Apache Doris PMC ChairJune 30, 2025

author.name: velodb.io · Rayner Chen, Apache Doris PMC Chair

entry.title: Community Voice | Lakehouse: Manus? MCP? Let’s Talk About Lakehouse and AI
entry.summary: The data analytics domain is no exception — Databricks, Snowflake, and Elasticsearch have all redefined themselves as AI data platforms or AI-ready data analytics and search products. Setting aside the “hype”, in today’s article, we’ll explore what relationship actually exists between Lakehouse and AI.

entry.title: Community Voice | Lakehouse: Starting With Apache Doris and S3 Tables
entry.summary: Based on data sharing, diverse workloads and collaboration, Lakehouse has brought us a new paradigm for data analysis. S3 Tables further simplify the setup and maintenance of underlying storage facilities on this basis, achieving a nearly out-of-the-box effect.
